title: Merrily We Live
writer: Eddie Moran, Jack Jevne, E.J. Rath
actors: Constance Bennett, Brian Aherne, Alan Mowbray
plot: Dizzy society matron Emily Kilbourne has a habit of hiring ex-cons and hobos as servants. Her latest find is a handsome "tramp" who shows up at her doorstep and soon ends up in a chauffeur's uniform. He also catches the eye of her...
awards: Nominated for 5 Oscars. 1 win & 5 nominations total
